nasb.text: Thus the sons of Israel did; according to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so they camped by their standards, and so they set out, every one by his family according to his father’s household.

esv.text: Thus did the people of Israel. According to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so they camped by their standards, and so they set out, each one in his clan, according to his fathers’ house.

cnv.text: 以色列人就照著耶和華吩咐摩西的一切行了，他們隨著自己的旗號安營，各人按著自己的宗族和父家起行。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列人照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，各按自己的旗号安营，各按自己的宗族启行。
